payload.answer: This looks like Sam’s employment record may need updating: the new statement says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72, while the existing memory says Sam works at Goldman. How would you like to handle it?
repair_options: Replace the existing memory with: “Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.”
Keep both memories separately, preserving the older Goldman fact and adding the new Point72 update as a separate note.
Update the memory to: “Sam used to work at Goldman and now works at Point72.”
